message:
feat(parser): add block-beta diagram parsing support

Implement a dedicated parser for Mermaid block-beta diagrams instead of
falling back to best-effort flowchart parsing. Key additions:

- BlockDef struct for representing block definitions with id, label,
  shape, column span, and space-placeholder metadata
- parse_block_beta() entry point handling columns directives, nested
  block groups (block:id / end), edges via existing flowchart operator
  detection, space placeholders, and multi-block single-line syntax
- Helper functions: parse_block_beta_columns, parse_block_beta_group_start,
  parse_block_beta_blocks, split_block_beta_defs, try_parse_block_beta_def
- Nested groups populate clusters and subgraphs with correct parent
  relationships; nodes receive block-beta CSS classes and span metadata
- Warnings emitted for column layout, group span, and block span features
  not yet fully implemented
- DiagramType::BlockBeta dispatch added to parse_mermaid_with_detection
- Five comprehensive tests covering basic blocks, multi-block lines,
  nested groups with clusters/subgraphs, edges, and space placeholders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
